title: Thesis
description: A modern, minimalist theme for thoughtful personal blogs.
body_md:
## Why I built Thesis

I wanted a theme that gets out of the way of the writing.

### Design decisions

- **One column.** No sidebar, no distractions.
- **Typography first.** A single, careful typeface for everything.
- **No JavaScript** for the reading experience.

### Stack

Built on Ghost 5 with Handlebars templates. Total CSS is under 10kb gzipped.
